title: Zhu Quezi
content:
Zhu Quezi
 was the previous owner and 14th of title of Suzaku. He was succeeded by 
Zhou Wutai
 who was selected by 
Wang Lin
 when he himself refused the title.

Zhuque Zi, who was wearing a red robe, appeared from the void. He looked at the direction of the Immortal Graveyard with a very ugly expression.

Trivia
[
]

His name "Zhu Quezi" means Vermillion Bird which means Suzaku which indicates that his "name" isn't actually a name but a title. But that begs the question about what is the story behind the name "Yun Quezi" (Zhu Quezi's younger brother) which means Cloud/Cloudy Bird.
